use_cases: Boolean form inputs for terms acceptance and agreements
Filter and category selection in search interfaces
Multi-select list items in task management
Cart item selection for e-commerce checkouts
ai_summary: An accessible checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Features proper focus-visible rings, disabled states, and checked/unchecked visual states with a checkmark indicator from Lucide icons. Designed as a reusable atomic form element suitable for any web application requiring boolean input controls.
